name: towow-review-toolkit
description: Review substrate for Towow runs: contract-driven Stop gate (verify-gate) + read-only reviewer subagent + evidence-packet schema + review-contract bindings. Ships the four assets that together implement Phase 1 §3.3 (Stop ≠ Completion ≠ Transition) and Phase 2 §3.8 (closure = commit + packet). Activating the plugin wires verify-gate as the project's Stop hook; the reviewer subagent spawns via merge-ready-review binding.
